locked.desc: The Terrane Enterprise license for this deployment has not been activated. Ask an administrator to activate it in the Admin Console to continue.
locked.expiredDesc: The Terrane Enterprise license for this deployment has expired. Ask an administrator to re-activate or renew it in the Admin Console.
locked.revokedDesc: The license for this deployment has been revoked. Please contact an administrator.
locked.mismatchDesc: The license is not bound to this deployment. Ask an administrator to activate a matching license.

login.title: Hey, welcome back
login.welcome: Sign in to enter your knowledge space.

register.title: Create your Terrane account
register.welcome: A personal knowledge space is created for you automatically on sign-up.
register.policy: At least 10 characters with 2+ character classes; must not equal your email.
register.checkEmailDesc: We sent a verification email to {email}. Click the link in it to verify, then sign in.

forgot.title: Reset your password
forgot.desc: Enter your account email and we'll send a reset link.
forgot.sent: If {email} is a registered address, a reset link has been sent. Please check your inbox.

reset.title: Set a new password
reset.mismatch: The two passwords do not match.
reset.done: Password reset — redirecting to sign in…
reset.noToken: The reset link is invalid or missing its token.

verify.title: Email verification
verify.ok: Email verified — you can sign in now.
verify.error: The verification link is invalid or expired. Sign in to resend a verification email.

home.desc: Your personal knowledge space is ready. Knowledge bases, chat, and agents roll out in later stages.

errors.AUTH_ACCOUNT_DISABLED: This account has been disabled. Contact an administrator.
errors.AUTH_ACCOUNT_LOCKED: Too many failed attempts. The account is temporarily locked — try again later.
errors.AUTH_EMAIL_NOT_VERIFIED: Your email isn't verified yet. Please complete email verification first.
errors.AUTH_PASSWORD_WEAK: Password too weak: at least 10 chars with 2 character classes, and must not equal your email.
errors.AUTH_PASSWORD_REUSED: The new password must differ from the current password.
errors.AUTH_TOKEN_INVALID: The link is invalid or has expired.
errors.RATE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED: Too many requests. Please try again later.
errors.RATE_LIMIT_LOGIN_BLOCKED: Too many sign-in attempts. Please try again later.
errors.NETWORK_ERROR: Network request failed. Check your connection.
errors.SYSTEM_HTTP_ERROR: System error. Please try again later.

kb.title: My knowledge bases
kb.subtitle: Feed in material; let it compile into searchable knowledge.
kb.empty: No knowledge bases yet. Click "New base" to start.
kb.notFound: Knowledge base not found or no access.
kb.noSources: No sources yet. Add text to start building.
kb.confirmDelete: Delete knowledge base "{name}"? This cannot be undone.
kb.searchHint: Enter keywords — vector semantic + lexical hybrid retrieval + rerank.
kb.confirmDeleteSource: Delete source "{name}" and all its chunks?
kb.shareDesc: Invite workspace members to collaborate (viewer read-only / editor can edit).
kb.chatHint: Ask the knowledge base; answers are grounded in your sources with citations.
chatExamples: What is this knowledge base about?
Summarize the key points for me
What are the main concepts and how do they relate?
kb.noChatModel: No chat model configured (add a chat channel under admin Model Channels).
kb.graphEmpty: No graph yet. Click "Build graph" to extract entities and relations.
kb.wikiCompilingHint: Compiling your sources into structured knowledge — this may take a few minutes. You can refresh and keep watching the progress.
kb.wikiEmpty: No Wiki yet. Click "Compile Wiki" to compile sources into structured knowledge.
kb.mcpDesc: Generate a key to mount this knowledge base as an MCP tool in Claude Code / Cursor.
kb.mcpEndpointHint: Auto-derived from your current address (http/https, IP/domain and port all follow the actual deployment). Put it into your MCP client.
kb.mcpTokenOnce: This token is shown only once — copy it now.
kb.mcpConfigHint: Add this to your MCP client config:
kb.mcpDeleteConfirm: Delete key "{name}"? Clients using it stop working immediately.
kb.connDesc: Plug this knowledge base into any app — Claude·Cursor (MCP), Dify, Coze, n8n, FastGPT — through standard retrieval APIs.
kb.connKeyHint: One key works for every method below and is bound to this knowledge base only. The token is shown once at creation.
kb.difyHint: In Dify, go to Knowledge → Connect to an external knowledge base → Add External Knowledge API, then fill in the three fields below. Dify calls /retrieval automatically.
kb.difyKnowledgeIdHint: Put this into Dify's "External Knowledge ID" field — it is this knowledge base's ID.
kb.apiOpenapiHint: Import this URL into a Coze plugin / GPTs Actions / n8n / FastGPT tool to use it as a retrieval tool. The server URL is auto-filled for your deployment.
kb.parseFailed: Parse failed or document is empty
kb.previewNoRender: This file type can't be previewed inline
kb.createDesc: Name your base and pick visibility — you can upload material anytime later.

lint.no_sources: This knowledge base has no sources yet — upload a file or add text.
lint.failed_sources: {n} source(s) failed to parse — click Reparse to retry.
lint.unembedded: {n}/{total} chunks have no vectors (embedding channel missing or failed); vector search is incomplete.
lint.no_graph: Knowledge graph not built yet — build it in the Graph tab.
lint.no_wiki: Wiki not compiled yet — compile it in the Wiki tab.

tierHint.fast: Lexical-only parsing — fastest, no token cost, best for plain text/code.
tierHint.standard: Lexical + vision model for images & scans. Recommended for daily use.
tierHint.high: Full-page large-model layout parsing — best table/formula/layout fidelity, but slower and more token-heavy.

kb.uploadAccept: Supports PDF / Word / Excel / PPT / text / video
kb.reparseDesc: Pick a parse tier and run it again. Failed sources often succeed at a higher tier.
kb.graphHint: Scroll to zoom · drag to pan/move nodes · hover to highlight · click to focus

kbPages.overviewSubtitle: Knowledge base stats, health score and suggested actions.
kbPages.sourcesSubtitle: Upload files or add text — they're parsed and compiled into retrievable knowledge.
kbPages.qaSubtitle: Ask the knowledge base; answers are grounded in its sources with citations.
kbPages.recallSubtitle: Test retrieval recall: hybrid vector + lexical search with reranking and hit scores.
kbPages.settingsSubtitle: Manage basics, shared members and deletion of this base.

kbSettings.deleteHint: Deleting permanently removes all sources, chunks, graph and wiki. This cannot be undone.

memory.title: My memory
memory.subtitle: Your long-term memory: auto-remembered from chats & uploaded docs, or add manually. Only you can see it.
memory.empty: No memories yet. Add one above.
memory.autoHint: When on, I automatically remember your preferences, facts and key events from your chats and uploaded documents (deduped + updated).

twofa.title: Two-factor (2FA)
twofa.enrollHint: Add this secret to an authenticator app (e.g. Google Authenticator), then enter the 6-digit code:
twofa.backupHint: Save these one-time backup codes (shown only once):

studio.title: Studio
studio.subtitle: One-click artifacts generated from your sources.
studio.synthHint: Writing script and synthesizing audio, ~1-2 min…

overview.subtitle: Your knowledge workspace at a glance.

graphPage.subtitle: Entities and relations extracted from your sources; pick a base.

chatPage.subtitle: Pick a base and ask questions grounded in its content.
chatPage.empty: Create a base and add sources first.

modelSettings.subtitle: Models used by the app, synced from admin Model Channels.
modelSettings.chatHint: Pick the model for Q&A/generation (from backend-configured options).
modelSettings.none: No chat channel configured in the admin yet.
modelSettings.othersHint: Embedding/rerank/multimodal are configured by the admin.

kindHint.embed: Used to vectorize sources (new sources use the new model).

modelSettings.noneKind: No channel configured for this purpose yet.
modelSettings.syncNote: Options sync from admin Model Channels.

assistant.welcomeSub: Grounded in your knowledge bases and memory. Ask me anything.
assistant.placeholder: Ask me anything… (Enter to send, Shift+Enter for newline)
assistant.noModel: No chat model configured (add a chat channel in admin).
assistant.kbHint: Answer grounded in your knowledge bases
assistant.webHint: Search the web for fresh info

source.askThisDocHint: Ask a question about just this document — answers are grounded in it with citations.
